creator: yuri.pankov@gmail.com
text:
Fix distinfo(I'm not sure if the distfile was re-rolled or the update was incorrect though).

Port maintainer (miwi@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_6 (mode: change, diff: CVS)

How-To-Repeat: phoenix:root:/usr/ports/irc/irssi-devel# make checksum
=> irssi-20120624.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://mirror.irssi.org/snapshots/irssi-20120624.tar.gz
fetch: http://mirror.irssi.org/snapshots/irssi-20120624.tar.gz: size mismatch: expected 1331265, actual 1331260
=> Attempting to fetch ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/irssi-20120624.tar.gz
fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/irssi-20120624.tar.gz: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/ and try again.
*** [do-fetch] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/irc/irssi-devel.
